meaning: n.<美方>(大草原上的)树林(尤指灌木林)
examples: We warmly invite you to attend Aussino South African Wine Tasting - La Motte.
I want to daydream about have a big house with a big swimming pool and hurst motte wood.
I can provide you with horses, provisions, guides, whatever is required to get you as far as Deepwood Motte.
La Motte is a historic Franschhoek site, with huge 17th-century importance in the then-gathering story of the French in South Africa.
Louis Cardinals manager summoned Marc Rzepczynski in Game 5 of the 2011 World Series, despite actually telling bullpen coach Derek Lilliquist to get right-hander Jason Motte warm.
